header.tagline: Technology architect and executive consultant specializing in AI/ML, cloud architecture, enterprise modernization, and regulatory compliance.

rag-pipeline.title: RAG and LLM Chaining Pipeline
rag-pipeline.note: LangChain, Ollama (llama3 + mistral), ChromaDB, n8n, Docker Compose. Production-grade multi-model orchestration stack.

site-upgrade.title: AI-Assisted Site Upgrade (Claude)
site-upgrade.note: Modernization of Dr. Stacy A.S. Williams' academic site. Claude-assisted React/Next.js SPA with multi-locale support.

enterprise-mod.title: Enterprise Modernization Demo
enterprise-mod.note: CDN migration patterns, white-label platform architecture, legacy-to-cloud transformation reference implementation.

cloud-arch.title: Cloud Architecture Demo
cloud-arch.note: Interactive cloud architecture reference. Visualizes multi-tier infrastructure patterns, service mesh, and deployment topologies.

bny-cdn.title: BNY Mellon CDN Platform
bny-cdn.note: Production CDN serving 100+ white-label applications via Akamai NetStorage. 95-99% server traffic offload at enterprise scale.

bigdata.title: Big-Data Dashboard (Laravel-style React)
bigdata.note: Full-stack data visualization platform with real-time climate data feeds. Demonstrates Laravel-pattern architecture in React.

tatcon.title: TATCON-SG
tatcon.note: Modernized front-end for tactical consulting firm. Redesigned for mobile-first delivery with updated component architecture.

msinter.title: MS Interdigital
msinter.note: Performance and visual modernization for technology services company. Improved CLS, LCP, and accessibility scoring.

3a.title: 3A Enterprises LLC
3a.note: Full ground-up build for business services client. Delivered React SPA with custom CMS integration and automated deployment pipeline.

aeos.title: AEOS Telescope System (Haleakala)
aeos.note: Adaptive electro-optical system. Contributed UX, real-time data processing, and RTOS integration. Delivered Air Force on-site software maintenance training. 3.67m aperture, Maui, HI.

tsc.title: TSC - Defense Software Samples
tsc.note: Classification interface samples and UX artifacts from defense software work. Radar systems, signal processing, and secure platform engineering.
